name: Settings - Webhook URL can be configured and test button is visible
description: After mock login, navigate to /settings and find the Webhook configuration section. Enter a valid webhook URL, save it, and verify the webhook URL is persisted. Verify the 'Test Webhook' button is visible and clickable.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /api/mock-login?secret=mantiz_e2e_bypass_2026 to authenticate the session
Verify the Settings page shows a Webhook section with a URL input field
Clear any existing value in the webhook URL input and type a valid URL such as https://webhook.site/test-mantiz
Click the Save or Update button in the Webhook section
Verify a success confirmation message or toast appears indicating the webhook URL was saved
Verify a 'Test Webhook' or 'Send Test' button is visible in the Webhook section
